name: Rutabaga-Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
(From "Scandinavian Cooking" by Beatrice Ojakangas. HP Books, Fisher Publishing Inc., Tucson.)
1. In a large saucepan, combine rutabagas, potatoes and water. Bring to a boil; cook over low heat for 25 minutes or until tender.
2. Drain, reserving liquid. Mash the rutabagas and potatoes until smooth.
3. Butter a shallow, 2-quart casserole dish; set aside.
4. Preheat oven to 300°F.
5. In a large bowl, beat the potato mixture on high speed, adding 1/2 cup of cooking liquid. Beat in flour, bread crumbs, cream, syrup, 1/4 cup melted butter, eggs, salt, allspice, nutmeg, ginger, and white pepper.
6. Beat until light and fluffy. Spoon into prepared casserole dish.
7. Use a spoon to smooth the top. Drizzle with 3 tablespoons melted butter.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 1.5-2 hours or until lightly browned.
